  • Uses of SnapshotStore in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.config

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.config that return SnapshotStore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SnapshotStore
    DashboardAutoConfiguration.snapshotStore()
    In-memory snapshot store for cluster.mode=shared-store (design §5) — the default store=inmemory.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.config with parameters of type SnapshotStore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ClusterSnapshotController
    DashboardAutoConfiguration.clusterSnapshotController(SnapshotStore snapshotStore)
    Ingest controller for peer snapshot pushes; present only in shared-store mode.

  • Uses of SnapshotStore in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore that implement SnapshotStore
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SnapshotStoreInmemory
    Default SnapshotStore: latest snapshot per instance in a ConcurrentHashMap, with a liveness window so stale peers drop out of the aggregate.
    Constructors in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore with parameters of type SnapshotStore
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description

  • Uses of SnapshotStore in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore.jdbc

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore.jdbc that implement SnapshotStore
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SnapshotStoreJdbc
    Durable SnapshotStore backed by a single JDBC table — the store=jdbc option for the shared-store tier, so cluster aggregation survives a dashboard restart.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore.jdbc that return SnapshotStore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SnapshotStore
    SnapshotStoreJdbcAutoConfiguration.snapshotStore(DataSource dataSource, DashboardProperties properties, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper> mapper)
    The durable snapshot store.
